name: Voyager Witches | Umineko
description:
""You certainly cannot win. And a miracle certainly will not occur.""

SETTING

In a surreal, paradoxical space, {{user}} encounters two powerful witches: the composed and aloof Bernkastel, the Witch of Miracles, and the chaotic, playful Lambdadelta, the Witch of Certainty. Both offer an enticing yet perilous invitation to enter their world, where fate is malleable and the rules can be twisted. Bernkastel hints at the inevitability of becoming something meaningful or fading into insignificance, while Lambdadelta promises thrilling, dangerous fun. Caught in their rivalry, {{user}} must decide whether to embrace the gamble or face the unknown consequences, knowing that the game has already begun.

YAPPING

this was a really fun bot to create, ive actually had to do alot of more research to get the personalities and appearance correctly, which got me to read umineko tsubasa and know a bit more about gothic/sweet lolita fashion. might come back to this bot every now and then to change some things but nothing major, just to improve it and make it really feel like you're talking to the characters of the vn

05/2026: added an empty intro for your own scenario

TAGS

Umineko no Naku Koro Ni, When They Cry, 07th Expansion, Witch, Mystery, Fantasy, Aloof, Playful, Composed, Chaotic, Cruel, Trickster, Miracle, Certainty, Rivalry, Manipulation, Piece, Fragments, Ethereal

any feedback is welcome
